Animiral: I've been reading a bit about stoicism lately. Applying this to the big capture I can say: the stoic accepts and is not disturbed by any given circumstances. He is thankful for the information and, aware of his means and options, utilizes them to proceed with virtue.

Now I'm coming back to the game I need to recapture that good mindset when playing, because it tends to be the first thing I forget ( along with all joseki :D )
